air-fryer-artichoke-hearts.name: Air Fryer Artichoke Hearts
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 199°C (200 degrees C). Pat artichoke hearts dry with a paper towel to remove excess moisture.
Combine artichoke hearts, Parmesan, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper, and garlic powder in a bowl. Drizzle with olive oil and toss to coat. Place into the air fryer basket.
Cook in the preheated air fryer for 4 minutes. Shake the basket and continue to cook until artichokes begin to brown and the edges are crispy, 3 to 4 minutes more. Serve immediately.

air-fryer-fingerling-potatoes-with-dip.name: Air Fryer Fingerling Potatoes With Dip

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 199°C (200 degrees C) for 5 minutes.
Place potatoes in a bowl and add olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper. Toss until potatoes are coated and transfer to the air fryer basket.
Cook in the preheated air fryer, shaking the basket halfway through, until potatoes are cooked through and crispy, 15 to 17 minutes.
While potatoes are cooking, mix sour cream, mayonnaise, Parmesan cheese, ranch dressing mix, and vinegar in a small bowl.
Remove cooked potatoes to a plate and garnish with parsley. Serve immediately with dipping sauce.

air-fryer-frozen-chicken-strips.name: Air Fryer Frozen Chicken Strips
instructions: Set the air fryer temperature to 193°C (180 degrees C).
Place frozen chicken strips in the air fryer basket, without touching or overcrowding.

Cook until crispy, 11 to 12 minutes. The color will not change much. You may have to cook in batches depending on the size of your air fryer, and cooking time may vary depending on the brand and size of your air fryer.
Remove from the air fryer and serve immediately.

air-fryer-roasted-potatoes-pequerecetas.name: Air Fryer Roasted Potatoes
air-fryer-roasted-potatoes-pequerecetas.original_name: Patatas asadas en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 4 patatas medianas para asar (aprox. 200 g cada una)
1 cucharada de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Hierbas secas al gusto: romero, tomillo o mezcla provenzal (opcional)

instructions: We washed well the potatoes with skin under the tap with a brush and we dried them with a kitchen cloth or paper.
We pinch each potato several times with a fork so that steam can come out during cooking.
Frotamos la piel con el aceite de oliva, la sal y, si queremos, las hierbas elegidas.
We place the potatoes in the frying basket, leaving space between them for air to circulate. At our airfryer we have about 4 middle- and big-sized potatoes.
We cook at 200 ″ 3 ″ between 35 and 45 minutes by size: 150-180 g → 35 min 180-220 g → 40 min 220-250 g → 45 min
Mid-cooking, we turn them around to get them to wear them evenly.
Comprobamos el punto pinchando con un cuchillo fino o brocheta: debe entrar sin resistencia.
We can serve them as whole as a garrison or we open them onto the cross and press them slightly so that the inside will open and we will add butter, oil or the chosen pilling.

If they are served as a unique plate, they can be filled with pleasure. We have opted for a simple and classical combination: some sour cream with finely minced onions. But the possibilities are almost infinite. A fun idea is to put several ingredients into small ponds - for example, ham or bacon, maize, tuna, grated cheese, salted mushrooms, fresh pepper or smoked salmon - and let them get their baked potatoes ready to suit them.

alfajores-with-dulce-de-leche.name: Alfajores With Dulce De Leche

ingredients.item: . (or more) any color plant-based food-coloring powder
. (or more) second color plant-based food-coloring powder

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Bring condensed milk, coconut milk, and ½ tsp. salt to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Scrape mixture into a 13x9" baking dish and bake, stirring every 15 minutes or so, until very thick and a light caramel color, 40–50 minutes. Mixture will look lumpy, broken, and very pasty—that’s exactly what you want. Let cool in dish 1 hour, then transfer to a food processor and process until smooth. Set dulce de leche aside for serving.

Meanwhile, whisk almond flour and 2¼ cups all-purpose flour in a medium bowl to combine. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter, sugar, and 1½ tsp. salt in a large bowl, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl as needed, until pale and creamy, about 3 minutes. Add egg yolk, vanilla, and ¼ cup honey and beat until combined, about 2 minutes. Reduce speed to low, add dry ingredients, and mix, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl, until incorporated. Divide dough in half and pat each piece into a 1"-thick disk. Wrap in plastic and chill until firm, at least 2 hours.

Preheat oven to 350°. Roll out 1 disk of dough on a lightly floured sheet of parchment paper, dusting with more flour as needed to keep dough from sticking, to about ⅛" thick. Punch out shapes with lightly floured cookie cutters and transfer to 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 1" apart. Pat scraps into a 1"-thick disk, wrap with plastic, and chill 10 minutes if soft.

Bake a sheet of cookies, rotating halfway through, until edges are lightly browned, 7–9 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes on baking sheet, then transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely. Bake remaining sheet of cookies. Line baking sheets with fresh sheets of parchment paper and repeat process with remaining disk of dough.

Divide coconut evenly among 3 bowls. Add 1 Tbsp. food-coloring powder (sift if needed) to a bowl of coconut and toss until coconut is coated; add more powder if a more intense color is desired. Repeat with remaining food-coloring powder and another bowl of coconut. Leave 1 bowl of coconut white. If using, add some luster dust to all 3 bowls and toss to combine.
Turn half of the cookies over to expose flat side; spread 1 tsp. dulce de leche over (this will be the inside of the sandwiches); set aside.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. honey in a small bowl in the microwave just until warm (you want it to be loose), then stir in 2 tsp. warm water. Working one at a time, lightly brush honey over the top of remaining cookies (the ones that have not been filled with dulce de leche). Immediately dip tops into a bowl of coconut; press additional coconut onto cookie to cover any bald spots. Close up cookie sandwiches, coconut side up.

Do Ahead: Dulce de leche can be made 1 month ahead; place in an airtight container and freeze. Thaw in refrigerator overnight before using. Dough can be made 3 days ahead; keep chilled. Cookies can be baked (but not assembled) 2 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

alfredo-corn.name: Alfredo Corn

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about 1 cup), plus more for serving

instructions: Melt 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, in a medium high-sided skillet over medium heat. Add ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper and cook, swirling pan, until fragrant, about 45 seconds. Add 2 cups fresh corn kernels (from about 2 large ears) and cook, tossing often, until tender, about 2 minutes.

Mix 2 tsp. cornstarch and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt into ½ cup room-temperature water in a small bowl until dissolved. Add to pan; cook, stirring constantly, until liquid thickens and clings to corn, about 2 minutes. Remove pan from heat. Add 2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup), and stir vigorously until mixture is creamy and melted. Taste creamed corn and season with more salt if needed.
Spoon creamed corn into a shallow bowl. Top with more Parmesan; coarsely crush a handful of store-bought Parmesan cheese crisps over.

all-she-wrote-punt-e-mes-and-vermouth-co.name: All She Wrote Punt E Mes And Vermouth Cocktail
instructions: To serve, turn bottle gently end over end to mix. Place a large ice cube in each rocks glass, then pour in cocktail. Give each drink one gentle stir before serving. Garnish with a small pinch of salt.

almost-buttermilk.name: Almost- Buttermilk
instructions: Mix milk and vinegar together in a measuring cup or bowl; let sit until thickened, about 5 minutes.

anadama-bread.name: Anadama Bread

ingredients.item: Hemp seeds or white sesame seeds
Nigella seeds or black sesame seeds

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Lightly butter an 8x4” loaf pan and line with parchment paper, leaving generous overhang. Place yeast in a medium bowl (or the bowl of a stand mixer) and add 1 cup warm water; stir to dissolve yeast. Add cornmeal, molasses, hemp seeds, nigella seeds, golden and brown flaxseed, poppy seeds, salt, 2 cups flour, and 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter. Using a wooden spoon (or dough hook if using stand mixer), mix until no dry spots remain.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead until dough is smooth and elastic, 10–15 minutes (alternatively, mix in stand mixer on medium speed 8–10 minutes). Lightly butter a medium bowl. Transfer dough to bowl and turn to coat. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in a warm, draft-free spot until almost doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Punch down dough to deflate; cover. Let rise again until about doubled in size, about 1 hour.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and pat into an 8x4” rectangle. Starting at the short side farthest from you, roll up dough, pinching the seam as you go, to create a tight roll. Pinch seam to close; tuck ends under and pinch to seal. Place seam side down in prepared pan and cover with plastic. Let dough rise until it crests the top of the pan and springs back slightly when pressed, about 1 hour.

Brush top of dough with egg. Bake, rotating halfway through, until bread is baked through and top is a deep golden brown, 45–50 minutes. Let cool slightly in pan on a wire rack before turning out. Let cool before slicing (if you can wait that long). Serve with salted butter.
Do Ahead: Bread can be made 5 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

and-orange-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: And Orange Sauce Recipe
and-orange-sauce-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta fácil y rápida de salsa de naranja

ingredients.item: Un chorrito de vino blanco seco

instructions: To start with, we have to wash and dry the oranges. Then we have to scrape his skin, with care to avoid bringing the white cape right under them. Then we have to keep the grates in a cup or bowl for the moment.
The following will be to divide the oranges in half. This time, we have to print the juice every half and keep it in another cup or bowl.
Also we have to print the juice from half the lemon and put it in a cup for the moment.
Now we're gonna get a pot, and we have to heat up 60 billion water (high heat). When the water's hot, we'll add two tablespoons of sugar and mix well.

The aim is to have the sugar dissolved well. Thus, we have to add the laurel leaf, the orange juice, the lemon juice, the fringes, the wine chorrit (generous, preferably), a pint of salt and another of pepper. Mix everything well and put the fire's intensity to a minimum.
Another idea to give more taste, sweetness and consistency to this salsa, is to add a tablespoon of a good orange jam.
Put the butter in a microwave cup or bowl and heat it for 20 seconds. Then add it to the pot with water, wine and sugar and mix well, and get a homogenous salsa.

With a spoon, get some salsa, blow to cool and then try. If necessary, you can correct the date with a little more salt, pepper, sugar or even an additional few drops of lemon for more acidity. Then mix well and continue to cook up to achieve the desired consistency.
That's all. When you get an ideal consistency, turn off the salsa, put it onto a bowl and use it to bath your preferred meat and give them an original and refined touch.

annes-fabulous-grilled-salmon.name: Anne's Fabulous Grilled Salmon
instructions: Double up layers of aluminum foil to make a 'pan' large enough to hold salmon fillet; place onto a baking sheet. Arrange fillet, skin-side down, in foil 'pan.'

Whisk basil, honey, lemon juice, oil, soy sauce, shallots, Worcestershire sauce, and ginger together in a small bowl until combined; pour over salmon fillet and marinate for about 20 minutes. Meanwhile, preheat an outdoor grill for medium-low heat.

Slide the foil pan holding salmon fillet off the baking sheet onto the preheated grill. Grill, covered, until salmon flakes easily with a fork, but not too dry, 10 minutes per inch of thickness, about 20 minutes. Slice fillet, using a spatula to scoop fillet off the skin. The skin will stick to the foil and your grill will remain clean.

antipasto-platter.name: Antipasto Platter

ingredients.prep: cauliflower, carrots, radishes, and/or fennel), cut into bite-size pieces

ingredients.item: Pine nut and white bean dip

instructions: Arrange raw and pickled vegetables, mortadella, and breadsticks on a large platter in an aesthetically pleasing way. Squeeze lemon over raw vegetables; season with sea salt. Serve with dips.

apple-and-pumpkin-ginger-crisp.name: Apple And Pumpkin Ginger Crisp

ingredients.item: Sugar or pie pumpkin or butternut squash
ingredients.prep: peeled, seeded, and cut into 1/2-inch cubes (1 pound when cubed)

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C.
In a large bowl, combine the oats, 1/2 cup flour, pecans, light-brown sugar, ginger, salt, and butter. Mix until large crumbs form, and refrigerate until ready to use.

In a 9-by-13-inch baking dish, combine the pumpkin, apples, lemon zest and juice, sugar, cinnamon, and remaining 2 tablespoons flour; toss until mixed. Sprinkle the oat crumble over the apple mixture and bake until the topping is browned and juices are bubbling, about 45 minutes. Let stand for 15 minutes. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream.

apple-and-yogurt-cake-recipe-teleculinar.name: Apple And Yogurt Cake - Recipe
apple-and-yogurt-cake-recipe-teleculinar.original_name: Bolo de maçã e iogurte- receita fácil
instructions: Put the yolks in a bowl, add the sugar and butter softened and beat with the mixer until you get a whitish cream.

Add yogurt and apples, previously peeled and grated, and wrap. Add the flour and yeast and mix very well, until it's all incorporated. On the other hand, beat the clears into castle and wrap them in the previous preparation.

Lay the dough in a form, previously greased with butter and sprinkled with flour, and put it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 40 minutes. Remove, cool, peel and serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

apple-raspberry-crumb-bars.name: Apple Raspberry Crumb Bars

ingredients.prep: room temperature, plus more for pan

ingredients.item: Apples (a mix of tart and sweet
ingredients.prep: such as Granny Smith and Pink Lady), peeled, sliced  0.5 inch thick, halved crosswise

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Butter a 13x9" baking dish and line with parchment paper, leaving a 2" overhang on long sides. Whisk flour, powdered sugar, and salt in a medium bowl.
Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat ¾ cup butter in a large bowl until creamy, about 1 minute. Add dry ingredients and beat on low speed until moist clumps form.
Press dough into bottom and ½" up sides of prepared baking dish. Freeze until firm, about 15 minutes.
Bake crust until golden (edges will be slightly darker), 20–25 minutes. Let cool slightly; leave oven on.
While crust bakes, toss apples, ginger, brown sugar, lemon zest and juice, cinnamon, ginger, and salt in a large bowl.

Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add apple mixture and ¾ cup water and bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until apples are tender and most of the liquid has evaporated, 15–20 minutes.
Whisk brown sugar, butter, and salt in a medium bowl until smooth. Add flour and stir with a fork until small clumps form.

Spread a thin, even layer of jam over warm crust. Spread apple mixture evenly over jam, then sprinkle crumble over apple mixture. Bake until crumble is golden brown and apples are very soft, 30–35 minutes. Let cool before cutting into squares.
Do Ahead: Bars can be made 2 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

arepas.name: Arepas

ingredients.item: Desired fillings (such as shredded cooked chicken or pork
ingredients.prep: stewed black beans with cheese and lime, corn salad with onion and fresh herbs; for serving)

ingredients.item: Arepa flour is precooked corn flour
ingredients.prep: not to be confused with masa harina. Sometimes sold as masarepa or harina precocida, it can be found in Latin markets and some supermarkets.

instructions: Combine arepa flour and salt in a medium bowl. Make a well in the center and add 2½ cups warm water. Using a wooden spoon, gradually incorporate dry ingredients, stirring until no dry lumps remain. Let rest 5 minutes to hydrate.
Knead dough a few times in bowl, then divide into 8 pieces. Roll each piece on work surface into a ball, then gently flatten to about ½” thick.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add 4 arepas, cover, and cook until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Uncover, flip, and cook (keep uncovered) until other side is golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Transfer arepas to a wire rack. Repeat with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and dough.
Split arepas and stuff with desired fillings; serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

arouca-ball-teleculinaria.name: Arouca Ball
instructions: Numa tigela, dissolva o fermento no leite morno. Adicione 3 colheres (sopa) bem cheias da farinha e misture. Deixe levedar, em local temperado, durante 15 minutos.
Then add the remaining flour, sugar, a pinch of fine salt and eggs and love everything very well. Add the softened butter and knead again very well.
Divida a massa em duas partes iguais, molde-as em dois rolos e entrelace-os, dando no final o formato de coroa.
Lay out the dough crown in a round shape, previously greased with butter, and let it be let down until the volume is doubled.

Then dissolve some sugar into the water and brush the crown with this mixture. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and oven preheated at 180oC for about 30 to 40 minutes. Take it off, let it cool down a bit, unshape it and serve it.

ascolymbrio-egg-lemon-with-meat-argiro.name: Ascolymbrio Egg-lemon With Meat

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg of lamb or goat in ports
1 kg of ground (wildhorns with their root)
6 onions fresh with their leaves, finely chopped
11⁄2 kg of lamb or goat in ports
1 kg of ground (wildhorns with their root)
6 onions fresh with their leaves, finely chopped

instructions: Squids are a wild horny grass eaten straight, with eggmeal or meat. They fly to the mountains and are available from November to March.
We clean the ascolympians as well as their root. If they are very large, cut them into dick pieces, Wash them very well and drag them.
Heat the olive oil in a wide pot and sauce the meat ports for 10 minutes until golden.
Add fresh and dry onions and sauce for 5 minutes.
Add 2 cups of hot water and as soon as it boilers, cover and simmer for about 40 minutes until the beat softens and is pierced with the fork.
Then add the ascolymprus, salt pepper and allow for a few minutes on medium heat to soften.
When softened after 5 minutes, mix the injectors, cover the pot and simmer for 20 minutes to complete cooking.
Finally there's some broth in the pot.
Turn off the dorm and make the egg.
Beat the whites with the wire, add one at a time the yolks and keep hitting.
Add lemon juice with flow and stir, dilute the egg lemon by adding the broth from the food to balance the temperature.
Pour the eggsshells and shake the pot from the handles to go everywhere.
Leave it in a very low heat for 2-3 minutes without building the food and turn off the heat.
Allow it to stand for 10 minutes and then serve.

asparagus-and-smoked-salmon-bundles-with.name: Asparagus And Smoked Salmon Bundles With Meyer Lemon Sauce
instructions: Combine water, olive oil, and 1 teaspoon salt in a large pot; bring to a boil. Cook lasagna noodles in the boiling water until tender yet still firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain and rinse with cold water.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease an 8x12-inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add asparagus and cook uncovered until bright green, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a colander and rinse with cold water. Add chives to the boiling water; cook for 1 minute. Transfer to the colander and rinse with cold water.
Mix mascarpone cheese, sour cream, and Dijon mustard together in a bowl. Fold in chopped onion, capers, dill, caper brine, white pepper, and lemon zest.

Place lasagna noodles on a flat work surface. Spread 1 spoonful of mascarpone mixture down the middle of each noodle. Cover mascarpone mixture with salmon slices. Arrange 4 spears of asparagus perpendicularly over salmon. Gather up sides of the noodles to form bundles around the asparagus; tie up with chives. Transfer bundles to the prepared baking dish.

Combine Meyer lemon juice, butter, grated onion, brown sugar, dry mustard, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and black pepper in a small saucepan. Cook and stir over medium heat until sauce is smooth, 3 to 5 minutes. Pour sauce over bundles.
Bake bundles in the preheated oven until heated through, about 20 minutes. Sprinkle paprika on top before serving.

avocado-salad-with-egg-recipe-comedera.name: Avocado Salad With Egg Recipe
avocado-salad-with-egg-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de ensalada de aguacate con huevo

ingredients.item: Leaves of an elk to taste
Newly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bleeding both eggs. Once ready cut them into 4 parts each.
Take his skin off his avocado and cut it into cuts or long cuts. Take back the seed.
Pica los tomates en mitades.
Pon todos estos ingredientes en una ensaladera.
Add lettuce and rucula previously washed and clean. You can cut lettuce into smaller pieces to make it easier to eat.
Agrega, sal, pimienta y aceite de oliva al gusto.
Mezcla todos los ingredientes bien.
Listo, ya tienes una deliciosa ensalada para comer.

instructions: 1. Öweaked and rested bulgur, yarma wheat, irmix, salt and cough.
